title: Wynntils URL Redirector
description: redirect the urls.json of Wyntils for Chinese Wynncraft players
body:
If you encounter network problems while downloading some Wynntils resources, this mod may help you out.

It simply replaces the resource links from Github to Fastly cdn.

Try visiting this website to see if you can access: 

[map test](https://quantil.jsdelivr.net/gh/Wynntils/Static-Storage@main/Reference/maps/map-main-1-1.png)

[json test](https://fastly.jsdelivr.net/gh/Wynntils/Static-Storage@main/Data-Storage/lootrun_tasks_named.json)

It also provides a reliable Google translation API.
